subject: Maria Gonzalez ↔ Agent Mike Rivera — Account Cancellation Request

analysis.body:
Agent Mike Rivera: TechCorp support, this is Mike. How can I help you?

Maria Gonzalez: Hi, I'd like to cancel my account. I'm switching to a competitor.

Agent Mike Rivera: I'm sorry to hear that, Maria. May I ask what's prompting the switch?

Maria Gonzalez: Honestly, the pricing. Your competitor is offering the same features for $30 a month instead of $50.

Agent Mike Rivera: I understand. Price is an important factor. Before you go, I want to make sure you're aware that we recently launched a loyalty discount for customers who've been with us over a year. You'd qualify for 25% off, bringing your monthly cost to $37.50.

Maria Gonzalez: I didn't know about that. That's closer, but still more expensive.

Agent Mike Rivera: I can also offer you a one-time additional discount of $5 per month for the next 6 months, bringing it to $32.50. Plus, our premium support and 99.9% uptime guarantee are included at no extra cost.

Maria Gonzalez: $32.50 with the premium support... let me think about that. Actually, that's competitive enough. I'll stay.

Agent Mike Rivera: Wonderful! I've applied both discounts to your account. They'll take effect on your next billing cycle. Is there anything else I can help with?

Maria Gonzalez: No, that's great. Thank you for working with me on this.

Agent Mike Rivera: My pleasure, Maria. We're glad to keep you as a customer!
Customer requested cancellation due to competitor pricing ($30 vs $50). Retention offer: 25% loyalty discount + $5/mo for 6 months = $32.50/mo. Customer retained.
